title: neotorularia contortuplicata
intro: Neotorularia contortuplicata, also known as Chinese fumewort, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Neotorularia contortuplicata include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
